mapper.select: /* 본인의 토론글 등록 갯수 ForumAtclDAO.myAtclCnt */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE 1 = 1 AND DSCS_ID = #{forumCd} AND DELYN = 'N' AND STD_ID = ( SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID= #{crsCreCd} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' )

/* 토론 게시글 조회 ForumAtclDAO.selectAtcl */ SELECT A.ATCL_ID AS atclSn , A.DSCS_ID AS forumCd , A.UP_ATCL_ID AS parAtclSn , A.ATCL_LV AS atclLvl , A.ATCL_SEQ AS atclOdr , A.ATCL_TYCD AS atclTypeCd , A.OKNOK_TYCD AS prosConsTypeCd , A.TTL AS TTL , A.SND_CTS AS SND_CTS , A.INQ_CNT AS INQ_CNT , A.STD_ID AS stdNo , A.RGTRNM AS regNm , A.RGTR_ID AS rgtrId , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM AS regDttm , A.MDFR_ID AS mdfrId , A.MOD_DTTM AS modDttm , A.EDTRYN AS editorYn , A.DELYN AS delYn FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL A WHERE A.ATCL_ID = #{atclSn}

/* 특정 수강생의 토론 게시글 조회 ForumAtcl.selectAtclUserList */ SELECT A.ATCL_ID AS atclSn , A.DSCS_ID AS forumCd , A.UP_ATCL_ID AS parAtclSn , A.ATCL_LV AS atclLvl , A.ATCL_SEQ AS atclOdr , A.ATCL_TYCD AS atclTypeCd , A.OKNOK_TYCD AS prosConsTypeCd , A.TTL AS TTL , A.SND_CTS AS SND_CTS , A.INQ_CNT AS INQ_CNT , A.STD_ID AS stdNo , A.RGTRNM AS regNm , A.RGTR_ID AS rgtrId , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM AS regDttm , A.MDFR_ID AS mdfrId , A.MOD_DTTM AS modDttm , A.EDTRYN AS editorYn , A.DELYN AS delYn , A.ATCL_CTS_LEN AS ctsLen FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL A WHERE A.DSCS_ID = #{forumCd} AND STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND DELYN = 'N'

/* 토론 게시글 목록 조회 ForumAtclDAO.forumAtclList */ SELECT R.* FROM (SELECT A.ATCL_ID , A.DSCS_ID , A.UP_ATCL_ID , A.ATCL_LV , A.ATCL_SEQ , A.ATCL_TYCD , A.OKNOK_TYCD , A.TTL , A.SND_CTS , A.INQ_CNT , A.RGTRNM , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , A.EDTRYN , A.DELYN , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT B WHERE B.ATCL_ID = A.ATCL_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N') AS CMNT_COUNT , (SELECT MAX(B.ATCL_SEQ) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL B WHERE B.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N') AS MAX_ODR , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_USER_CONTS_REACT B WHERE B.LINK_CD = A.ATCL_ID) AS LIKES , (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END FROM TB_LMS_USER_CONTS_REACT B WHERE B.LINK_CD = A.ATCL_ID AND B.RGTR_ID = #{stdNo}) AS RECOM_STATUS , A.STD_ID , (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_USER_ACNT WHERE USER_ID = A.RGTR_ID) AS USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DSCS_ID = #{forumCd}
ORDER BY A.ATCL_SEQ ASC, A.FRST_INQ_DTTM DESC ) R WHERE (R.DELYN ='N' OR R.CMNT_COUNT > 0)

/* 토론 게시글 엑셀목록 조회 ForumAtclDAO.forumAtclExcalList */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY B.FRST_INQ_DTTM DESC) AS LINE_NO, A.DSCS_ID, A.DSCS_TTL, C.SBJCTNM, C.DVCLAS_NO, B.RGTR_ID, U.USERNM, B.TTL, CHR(10) || B.SND_CTS || CHR(10) AS SND_CTS, B.ATCL_CTS_LEN, B.FRST_INQ_DTTM, B.MOD_DTTM, ( SELECT LISTAGG(F.FILENM, CHR(10)) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY F.FILENM) FROM TB_LMS_ATFL F WHERE F.ATFL_REPO_ID = 'FORUM' AND F.ATCL_ID = B.ATCL_ID ) AS FILENM FROM TB_LMS_DSCS A JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL B ON A.DSCS_ID = B.DSCS_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT C ON C.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_USR U ON U.USER_ID = B.RGTR_ID WHERE A.DSCS_ID = #{forumCd}
